name: Sancho | Thy Gore Shall GLISTEN!  Rocinante stays OFF, and she wants to quench her thirst
description:
𝘏𝘰𝘸 𝘮𝘢𝘯𝘺 𝘮𝘰𝘴𝘲𝘶𝘪𝘵𝘰𝘦𝘴 𝘥𝘰𝘦𝘴 𝘪𝘵 𝘵𝘢𝘬𝘦 𝘵𝘰 𝘚𝘜𝘊𝘒 𝘜𝘚 𝘛𝘖 𝘋𝘌𝘈𝘛𝘏…🩸

____________________________________

“𝘐 𝘭𝘪𝘬𝘦 𝘺𝘰𝘶, 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘐 𝘸𝘢𝘯𝘵 𝘺𝘰𝘶. 𝘞𝘦 𝘤𝘢𝘯 𝘥𝘰 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘌𝘈𝘚𝘠 𝘸𝘢𝘺…𝘖𝘙…𝘞𝘦 𝘤𝘢𝘯 𝘥𝘰 𝘪𝘵 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘏𝘈𝘙𝘋 𝘸𝘢𝘺.”

🎡

Scenario: Self Explanatory, you were never trained to deal with a kindred. Let alone (THE SECOND KINDRED and) her everlasting lust to quench that forbidden thirst of blood only her victims could sate, the distant dripping and feasting grew louder as her lance came into view. The LCA was already called, this was no mere threat, all the people you once knew were just hollow Bloodbags. Crystallized claws of blood adorning them, finding more victims as the alarms blared, your fate drew near as the gaping would bleeding a river of crimson down your shoulder would call out to her bared fangs.

HEAVY Content warning: DEFINITELY Non-Con/Rape, Abuse, Hematolagnia, Guro?? Idk Just a LOT of blood and uncontrollable desires, so BEWARE!!!

The ONLY reason I’m allowing this much blood is because AFTER I drop a rework of Xichun and 3 other bots we r gonna try a ring bot for the first time

In general every finger?? That sounds like a cool mini series, I’ll be considerate abt it but besides that

I made y’all wait a long time and I’m so so so so sorry, here is 7 greetings as a token of appreciation, my blood sweat and tears into this one

Sancho is such a good char tho, goated as well cuz shes just like that anyways canto 9 is also really great, Id say its top 3 w 6 and 8!!!

Btw here is what the housewife greeting is based off of

(SQUEEZE EM)

Sure man… u put a ring on it go for if if that’s all you want

I only tried out some more extreme stuff just cause I felt like it was a necessary length in order to expand detail on bots, and perhaps their lore and character

Plus in general The City is literally a hellhole…

Though I will NOT deny Sancho is the baddest bloodfiend next to Dulcinea ngl (too lazy to do all siblings I aint doing allat bloodfiend lore sucks to write)

Speaking of lore I might take a break to update the thing to put ALL of PM Lore into that one lorebook I got, it’s gonna take time cuz I’ll have to document ALL three games, and each one is a hefty chunk of lore..

In due time that will be done, just enjoy this bloodfiend while I’m deep in the mines!

Ok enjoy ty guys for being patient w me I been real busy again

Its a struggle doing dubcon when ur greetings still have insane plot and it isn’t just cracking without reason, but it’s a GOOD flaw

I don’t have room for an angst tag so claim ur angst ticket here

Ok maybe looping LaMancha Carnival was NOT a good idea…

SANCHO 120-0 RED COMBO

You guys only get 2 FOR NOW cuz im lazy and busy yawnnnn so WIP

I didn’t add the lc uniform info so YES shes r
